author: tinswangtao-web
description: 全局 Emoji 插入工具，支持标题、文件重命名、右键菜单、移动端等场景 - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Tutu
manifest.description: 全局 Emoji 插入工具，支持标题、文件重命名、右键菜单、移动端等场景.
manifest.name: Tutu Emoji Toolbar

name: Tutu Emoji Toolbar

releases.author: tinswangtao-web
releases.description:
Release 1.0.2

- Fix Obsidian community review issues.
- Add minAppVersion and clean manifest metadata.
- Improve popout-window compatibility with activeDocument and cross-window instanceOf checks.
- Remove deprecated execCommand fallback and direct style assignments.
- Remove CSS !important usage.

releases.author: tinswangtao-web
releases.description:
Release 1.0.1

- Sync emoji insertion in the first H1 title with the active file name.
- Keep file renames in their original folder.
- Update plugin identity to Tutu Emoji Toolbar / tutu-emoji-toolbar.
- Fix Windows build script compatibility.
